bsync 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Get started
    • Core estimators
    • Windowed Cross-Correlation
    • Windowed Dynamic Time Warping
    • Windowed Granger Causality
    • Going deeper
    • Choosing Analysis Parameters
    • Surrogate Testing for Significance
    • Determining the Downsampling Rate

Package index

Estimators

Windowed estimators of nonstationary lead-lag synchrony. All three return a bsync_surface object with a shared print(), summary(), and plot().

wcc()
Windowed Cross-Correlation
wdtw()
Windowed Dynamic Time Warping
wgranger()
Windowed Granger Causality
print(<wcc_res>)
Print method for wcc_res objects
print(<wdtw_res>)
Print method for wdtw_res objects
print(<wgranger_res>)
Print method for wgranger_res objects
summary(<wcc_res>)
Summary method for wcc_res objects
summary(<wgranger_res>)
Summary method for wgranger_res objects
plot(<wcc_res>)
Plot wcc_res object
plot(<wdtw_res>)
Plot wdtw_res object
plot(<wgranger_res>)
Plot wgranger_res object

Surrogate testing

Generate null distributions (pseudo-synchrony) and compare observed statistics against them. Two-step pipeline: generate a surrogate matrix, then pass it to the matched surrogate wrapper.

generate_surrogate_circular()
Generate Circular Shift Surrogates
generate_surrogate_phase()
Generate Phase-Randomized Surrogates (Fourier Transform)
wcc_surrogate()
Calculate Surrogate Windowed Cross-Correlations
wdtw_surrogate()
Calculate Surrogate Windowed Dynamic Time Warping (WDTW)
wgranger_surrogate()
Calculate Surrogate Windowed Granger Causality
print(<wcc_surr>)
Print method for wcc_surr objects
print(<wdtw_surr>)
Print method for wdtw_surr objects
print(<wgranger_surr>)
Print method for wgranger_surr objects

Optima extraction & leadership

Extract lag optima from an estimator surface and derive a continuous Leadership Asymmetry Index (LAI).

pick_optima()
Find Optimum (Peak or Valley) in Windowed Analyses
leadership_asymmetry()
Calculate Leadership Asymmetry Index
plot_optima_overlay()
Plot Surface with Optima Overlay
print(<wcc_optima>)
Print method for wcc_optima objects
print(<wdtw_optima>)
Print method for wdtw_optima objects
summary(<wcc_optima>)
Summary method for wcc_optima objects
summary(<wdtw_optima>)
Summary method for wdtw_optima objects
print(<bsync_lai>)
Print method for bsync_lai objects
plot(<bsync_lai>)
Plot bsync_lai object

Parameter guidance

Tools for choosing and evaluating analysis hyperparameters. Start with suggest_wcc_params() for a single dyad, use synchrony_multiverse() to visualize the specification curve, and autotune_wcc() for multi-dyad datasets. select_specification() is the underlying selection rule for advanced use.

suggest_wcc_params()
Suggest WCC Hyperparameters
synchrony_multiverse()
Synchrony Multiverse Analysis
autotune_wcc()
Auto-Tune WCC Parameters for a Multi-Dyad Dataset
select_specification()
Select the Best Specification from a Multi-Dyad Multiverse
print(<bsync_autotune>)
Print method for bsync_autotune objects
print(<bsync_multiverse>)
Print method for bsync_multiverse objects
summary(<bsync_multiverse>)
Summary method for bsync_multiverse objects
plot(<bsync_multiverse>)
Plot a synchrony multiverse specification curve

Preprocessing — signal & kinematics

Smooth, trim, and compute kinematic derivatives on continuous signals before running a synchrony estimator.

smooth_signal()
Smooth a Time Series Signal
trim_edges()
Trim Edge Effects from Data
calc_velocity_1d()
Calculate 1D Velocity
calc_speed_1d()
Calculate 1D Speed
calc_speed_2d()
Calculate 2D Speed
calc_speed_3d()
Calculate 3D Speed
evaluate_signal_power()
Evaluate Signal Power and Suggest Downsampling Rate
plot(<signal_power_res>)
Plot method for signal_power_res objects

Preprocessing — resampling & gaps

Resample continuous signals and diagnose or repair time-series gaps.

downsample_signal()
Downsample a Time Series Signal via Rolling Aggregation
aggregate_by_time()
Aggregate Time Series Data by Time Bins
diagnose_ts_gaps()
Diagnose Missing Data Gaps in a Time Series
impute_ts_gaps()
Impute Missing Values in Continuous Time Series with Metadata

Tidy interface

tidy(), glance(), and as_tibble() methods for bsync_surface and bsync_multiverse objects, enabling integration with tidyverse workflows.

reexports tidy glance as_tibble
Objects exported from other packages
tidy(<bsync_surface>)
Tidy a bsync_surface object into a tibble of per-cell results
tidy(<bsync_multiverse>)
Tidy a bsync_multiverse object into the specification grid
glance(<bsync_surface>)
One-row summary of a bsync_surface object
glance(<bsync_multiverse>)
One-row robustness summary of a bsync_multiverse object
as_tibble(<bsync_surface>)
Convert a bsync_surface object to a tibble
as_tibble(<bsync_multiverse>)
Convert a bsync_multiverse object to a tibble

Data

sim_dyad
Simulated Dyadic 3D Positional Data

On this page
